spec.description: Fleet health and per-device-type telemetry (MR/MS/MX/MT/MV) for the Meraki Dashboard Exporter. MX/MV tabs appear only for orgs with those devices; MT only for homelab.
meraki_mr_clients_connected has no serial label; keyed by model+network.
spec.title: Clients Connected per AP

spec.description: F-151: 6GHz series included (ready for WiFi 6E). No 6GHz metric present in this fleet (WiFi 6 MR56).
spec.title: Channel Utilisation (total) by band

spec.description: F-151: band label values are '2.4'/'5'/'6' (not '2.4GHz'). Includes 6 if present.
spec.title: Radio Channel by Band

spec.description: Aggregate lost packets / total packets across MR radios.
spec.title: Packet Loss % (upstream+downstream)

spec.description: Wireless threat visibility from Air Marshal.
spec.title: Air Marshal BSSIDs / SSIDs Seen

spec.description: Org-level port aggregates (meraki_ms_ports_active has no per-switch label).
spec.title: Switch Ports Active / Inactive

spec.description: Sum of per-port traffic per switch, rx/tx.
spec.title: Port Traffic by Direction (Bps)

spec.description: Per-port link status, speed, duplex. status 1=connected.
spec.title: Switch Port Status

spec.description: Count of appliance uplinks in each status (active/ready/failed/not connected).
spec.title: WAN Uplinks by Status

spec.description: Appliance high-availability state. #642: getDeviceAppliancePerformance errors on DevNet MX, so no performance-score panel.
spec.title: HA Role / Enabled

spec.description: Count of devices reporting up=1, split by device type.
spec.title: Devices Up by Type

spec.description: Top 15 devices by memory usage percent.
spec.title: Memory Utilisation % (top devices)

spec.description: One row per device: name, type, model, serial, status, network.
spec.title: Device Status Table
Meraki – Devices
